title: Collate bug-ID first-class argument — no --purge-events required
description: Make collate.cjs accept bug IDs as a first-class positional argument. `collate.cjs HELLO-B02` should work identically to `collate.cjs HELLO-B02 --purge-events`. Bug IDs are not a side effect of a flag.

plan.objective: Make collate.cjs accept bug IDs as first-class positional arguments, auto-enabling event purging without requiring --purge-events
key_changes: Added isBugId() helper function detecting BUG-\d+ and *-B\d+ patterns
Auto-enable PURGE_EVENTS when positional argument matches bug-ID pattern
Improved error message when ID not found in store (distinguishes bug vs sprint)
Updated usage comment to document bug-ID first-class argument support
Added 12 new tests for isBugId covering all pattern variants
